subject: refactor(z-index): move skip-to-content z-index to JSX className
body:
Drop the raw z-index from .skip-to-content in index.css and apply
z-[70] on the <a> element instead. Every overlay in src/ now sets its
z-index the same way — Tailwind utility on the element — so the scale
has a single shape and there is no longer a CSS/TS pair to keep in
sync for this element.

Tags: refactor, z-index, consistency
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-docs
Semver: patch
title: move skip-to-content z-index to JSX className
